columns.name: innlesing
columns.description: Source of the record entry

columns.name: fknr
columns.description: Foreign key number

columns.name: levnr
columns.description: Level identifier for the record

columns.name: levvarenr
columns.description: Product number at level of hierarchy

columns.name: varenavn
columns.description: Name of the product

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: Time and date when the record was entered or modified

columns.name: anbfpris_fom
columns.description: Date from which ancillary base price is effective

columns.name: paknkode
columns.description: Code for the package or unit of measure

columns.name: levvarenr_ekst
columns.description: External product number at level of hierarchy

columns.name: enhetsvekt
columns.description: Weight of the unit or package

columns.name: status_til
columns.description: Status to which the record transitions

columns.name: vises_web
columns.description: Indicates if the product is visible on the web portal

columns.name: selges_web
columns.description: Indicates if the product can be sold through the web portal

columns.name: pris_web
columns.description: Price of the product on the web portal

columns.name: web_hentes_buttikk
columns.description: Indicates if the web portal retrieves data from a specific store

columns.name: fff_kategoriori
columns.description: FFF category code for the product or record

columns.name: m3_enhet
columns.description: Unit of measure in cubic meters

columns.name: tolltariffnr
columns.description: Toll tariff number associated with the product or record

columns.name: lev_varegr
columns.description: Product group at level of hierarchy

columns.name: oppr_land
columns.description: Country where the product or record originates from

columns.name: sds
columns.description: Safety data sheet for the product or record

columns.name: produkteier
columns.description: Person or department responsible for the product or record

columns.name: start_dato
columns.description: Start date of validity or effectiveness

columns.name: slutt_dato
columns.description: End date of validity or effectiveness

columns.name: relex_sortiment
columns.description: Relex category for the product or record

columns.name: relex_seasons_fra
columns.description: Start date of the season in Relex system

columns.name: relex_seasons_til
columns.description: End date of the season in Relex system
